option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <configuration> <property name="LOG_PATTERN_CONSOLE" value="%d{HH:mm:ss} %highlight(%-5level) %logger{36} - %msg%n"/>
<!-- CONSOLE Appender: For test output only --> <appender name="CONSOLE" class="ch.qos.logback.core.ConsoleAppender"> <target>System.out</target> <encoder> <pattern>${LOG_PATTERN_CONSOLE}</pattern> <charset>UTF-8</charset> </encoder> </appender>
<!-- Test profile: DEBUG level for better visibility during testing --> <root level="DEBUG"> <appender-ref ref="CONSOLE"/> </root>
<!-- Reduce noise from verbose libraries during tests --> <logger name="org.springframework" level="INFO"/> <logger name="org.springframework.web" level="DEBUG"/> <logger name="org.hibernate" level="INFO"/> <logger name="org.testcontainers" level="INFO"/>
</configuration>
